samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable parameters WIDTH and DEPTH.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">FIFO data width.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">FIFO depth.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define internal signals
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0] waddr;
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0] raddr;
        reg wen;
        reg ren;
        
        // Connect input signals to internal signals
        assign wen = winc & !wfull;
        assign ren = rinc & !rempty;
        assign waddr = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        assign raddr = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        assign rdata = rdata;
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instance
        dual_port_RAM #(.DEPTH(DEPTH), .WIDTH(WIDTH)) ram_inst(
            .wclk(wclk),
            .wenc(wen),
            .waddr(waddr),
            .wdata(wdata),
            .rclk(rclk),
            .renc(ren),
            .raddr(raddr),
            .rdata(rdata)
        );
        // Write pointer management
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0] waddr_bin;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (wen) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Read pointer management
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0] raddr_bin;
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (ren) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        // Convert write pointer to Gray code
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] wptr;
        always @(*) begin
            wptr[($clog2(DEPTH))+1] = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1];
            for (int i = $clog2(DEPTH); i >= 0; i=i-1) begin
                wptr[i] = wptr[i+1] ^ waddr_bin[i];
            end
        end
        // Convert read pointer to Gray code
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] rptr;
        always @(*) begin
            rptr[($clog2(DEPTH))+1] = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1];
            for (int i = $clog2(DEPTH); i >= 0; i=i-1) begin
                rptr[i] = rptr[i+1] ^ raddr_bin[i];
            end
        end
        // Buffer register for write pointer synchronization
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] wptr_buff;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        end
        // Buffer register for read pointer synchronization
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] rptr_buff;
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        end
        // Synchronize read pointer to write clock domain
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] rptr_syn;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                rptr_syn <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_syn <= rptr_buff;
            end
        end
        // Synchronize write pointer to read clock domain
        reg [($clog2(DEPTH))+1:0] wptr_syn;
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                wptr_syn <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_syn <= wptr_buff;
            end
        end
        // Full and empty condition checks
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_syn[($clog2(DEPTH))+1], rptr_syn[$clog2(DEPTH):1]});
        assign rempty = (rptr == wptr_syn);
    </implementation>
</module>
